title: Just Create SMP RE
body:
A remake based off of the modpack created for the Just Create SMP. ([link here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/just-create-smp)) This is NOT a one to one recreation as Modrinth does not have all of the mods on the website. If you want an exact replica of the modpack for personal use, just delete any mods added by me and download them off of curseforge. 
Any mod added by myself is meant to replicate the function of any I deleted. Hope you have fun!!

Modlist (any with ** are added by me):
- [EMF] Entity Model Features by Traben 
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features by Traben
- 3D Skin Layers by tr7zw
- AppleSkin by squeek502
